title: lisianthius spathulatus
intro: Lisianthius spathulatus, also known as the tongue plant, is a species of flowering plant in the bignonaceae family, native to tropical America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Lisianthius spathulatus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve making a tea from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
